CreatePeerConn.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreatePeerConn.bandwidthInMbps: Bandwidth of the peering connection in Mbps
CreatePeerConn.peerAccountId: Peer account ID, required only when creating a cross-account peering connection
CreatePeerConn.peerVpcId: ID of the peer VPC for the peering connection
CreatePeerConn.peerRegion: Region of the peer end of the peering connection
CreatePeerConn.peerIfName: Interface name of the peer end; only allowed to be set for same-account peering connections
CreatePeerConn.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing: Prepaid or Postpaid. Required when creating an order; not required for renewal orders
CreatePeerConn.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Not required for Postpaid; required for Prepaid
CreatePeerConn.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to be created
CreatePeerConn.tags.tagKey: Tag key, may contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 1-65
CreatePeerConn.tags.tagValue: Tag value, may contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 0-65
CreatePeerConn.deleteProtect: Whether to enable deletion protection. Default is false, meaning deletion is allowed
